name: Bounty Quick Size Paper Towels, White, 8 Family Rolls
short_description:
FAMILY ROLLS: Each pack contains 8 Family Rolls of Bounty white Quick-Size paper towels, equivalent to 20 regular rolls, ensuring you’re well-stocked for all your cleaning needs.
SUPERIOR SHEET COUNT: With 4 packs of 2 Family Rolls, these paper towels offer more sheets for more tasks, providing excellent value compared to Bounty Double Plus.
QUICK SIZE CONVENIENCE: Designed with quick size sheets, these paper towels tear easily for handling messes big and small, outperforming the leading ordinary brand in versatility and efficiency.
HIGHLY ABSORBENT: These paper towels are 2X more absorbent than the US leading ordinary brand, allowing you to use less and achieve more, making them a cost-effective and eco-friendly choice.
AWARD-WINNING PERFORMANCE: Bounty is the most awarded paper towel brand, recognized by online media for outstanding performance over the past 8 years.
FAST CLEANUP: Engineered to pick up messes quicker than leading ordinary brands, these paper towels save time and effort in your daily cleaning routine.
DURABLE DIAMOND TEXTURE: The durable diamond texture of these paper towels ensures strength and reliability, making them ideal for tough cleaning tasks.
product_description: Bounty Quick Size Paper towels are 2x more absorbent, so you can clean up messes quicker and use less than the leading ordinary brand. Each sheet has a Durable Diamond Texture to tackle anything from everyday spills to tough projects throughout your home. A variety of pack and rolls sizes are available, and going bigger means you change the roll less often vs Bounty Regular Rolls to always have Bounty on hand. Buy in bulk! Bounty Quick Size towels have easy tear sheets, so you can select your sheet size based on the size of your mess.
